title: Get a copy of a police caution for domestic abuse
body: "To get a copy of the police caution, you should:   check the caution is for a domestic abuse offence  fill in as much as you can of the sample letter send it to the Data Protection Officer at the police force that gave the caution   You may have to pay a charge for your copy.  You can use this as evidence if you’re applying for legal aid to divorce or separate from an abusive partner.  The caution must be for one of these domestic abuse offences.  If you’re using a lawyer, they will be able to help you. "
